title: taraxacum boreicola
intro: Taraxacum boreicola, also known as the boreal dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum boreicola include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
